arts.ttl: Preview: Antalyaspor vs. Besiktas - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Turkish Super Lig clash between Antalyaspor and Besiktas, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Antalyaspor were beaten 1-0 by Goztepe last time out. They conceded almost two dozen chances and showed no signs of improvement in Belozoglu's first game in charge. Outgoing manager Alex accused the c...
